usersQuery: select users.id, first_name, last_name, email from users where email = $1
ordersQuery: select orders.id, orders.amount, orders.status, orders.created_at, orders.checked_out_at, orders.paid_at, offers.title offers, users.email as user from orders join users on orders.user_id = users.id join order_offers on orders.id = order_offers.order_id join offers on order_offers.offer_id = offers.id where users.email = $1
paymentsQuery: select payments.id, payments.base_currency_amount amount, payments.amount_refunded, sum(payments.base_currency_amount) - sum(payments.base_currency_amount_refunded) as net_revenue, payments.status, payments.transaction_ref transaction_reference, payments.gateway, payments.created_at, users.email from payments join invoices on invoices.id = payments.invoice_id join orders on orders.id = invoices.order_id join users on orders.user_id = users.id where users.email = $1 group by payments.id, users.email
shipmentsQuery: select shipments.id, shipments.reference_number, shipments.status, shipments.created_at, users.email from shipments join users on users.id = shipments.user_id where users.email = $1
invoicesQuery: select invoices.id, invoices.base_currency_amount base_amount, invoices.amount, invoices.status, invoices.paid_at, users.email from invoices join orders on orders.id = invoices.order_id join users on users.id = orders.user_id where users.email = $1
